turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I'm a new patient. Never visited your clinic before. I want to consult about some chest pain I've been having on and off.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Welcome to Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic! Chest pain is definitely something we'd want a cardiologist to evaluate. Dr. Rajeev Bhatt is our cardiologist and has an opening tomorrow at 10 AM or Friday at 4 PM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Tomorrow is better, let's do that. My name is Imran Syed and my number is 9777654321.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Confirmed, Mr. Syed! Appointment with Dr. Rajeev Bhatt tomorrow at 10 AM. Please note down any pattern you've noticed — when the pain occurs, how long it lasts, any triggers. That'll really help the consultation. Confirmation SMS coming your way.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Will do. And where do I register when I arrive?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please head to the new patient registration desk on the ground floor — it's right next to the main entrance. Arrive 10 to 15 minutes early to complete your paperwork.
